introSection: Mouse Trap is a steel roller coaster located at Wonderland Amusement Park in Amarillo, Texas, USA. The ride dates back to 1972. Prior to 2011, it was known as Big Coaster.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: On April 19, 1987, a 15-year-old boy was killed after falling from the roller coaster. According to local authorities, the lap bar gave way.

fullText:
Mouse Trap is a steel roller coaster located at Wonderland Amusement Park in Amarillo, Texas, USA. The ride dates back to 1972. Prior to 2011, it was known as Big Coaster.

Red track with white supports.



On April 19, 1987, a 15-year-old boy was killed after falling from the roller coaster. According to local authorities, the lap bar gave way.
